log_in.passkey_unsupported: This browser does not support passkeys.
log_in.failed: Could not verify your passkey. Please try again.
log_in.unsupported: This device cannot use the passkey type the site requires.
log_in.security_error: The site origin does not match the configured relying party. Ask an admin to check the Passkey settings.
log_in.throttled: Too many passkey login attempts. Please wait a minute and try again.

suggest.title: Set up a passkey
suggest.body: Sign in faster next time, without having to remember a password. Your device generates a passkey that only works on this site.

required.body: Your role requires you to register a passkey before you can continue.

settings.heading: Passkeys
settings.description: Passkeys let you sign in without a password using your device or a hardware key.
settings.invalid_device_name: The passkey name must be between 1 and 64 characters.

bulk_revoke_modal.body: Revoke all {count} of your passkeys? You will not be able to sign in with any of them afterwards.

list.empty: You have not added any passkeys yet.

revoke_modal.title: Revoke passkey
revoke_modal.body: Are you sure you want to revoke {device}? You will not be able to sign in with this passkey afterwards.

alerts.registration_failed: Could not register your passkey. Please try again.
alerts.registration_already_exists: This device already has a passkey for your account. Revoke the existing one first, or use a different device.
alerts.registration_security_error: The site origin does not match the configured relying party. Ask an admin to check the Passkey settings.
alerts.registration_unsupported: This device cannot register a passkey of the type the site requires.

gdpr.export_description: Includes the device label, last-used timestamp, IP, and authenticator metadata for each registered passkey. Public keys identify a credential but cannot be used to forge a sign-in.
gdpr.anonymize_description: All passkeys belonging to this user are revoked.
gdpr.delete_description: All passkeys belonging to this user are deleted.

revoked.subject: A passkey was removed from your {forum} account
revoked.actor_self: You initiated this revoke from the security tab.
revoked.actor_admin: A site moderator removed it on your behalf.

counter_regression.subject: Possible passkey clone detected on your {forum} account
counter_regression.body:
Hi {username},

An attempt to sign in to {forum} with your passkey "{device}" failed because the credential reported a signature counter lower than the one we have on record. This is the canonical signal that the credential may have been copied to a second device.

The login was rejected. We recommend you sign in with your password, revoke this passkey, and register a fresh one. If you have other devices configured with the same credential, also remove them from your password manager.

{forum}

backup_state.subject: Sync state changed for a passkey on {forum}
backup_state.body:
Hi {username},

Your passkey "{device}" on {forum} is now {state}.

If you triggered this yourself (for example by signing in to iCloud Keychain or a password manager on a new device), you can ignore this message. If not, sign in and review the security tab. The passkey may have been copied to another device.

{forum}
backup_state.synced: synced to a cloud password manager
backup_state.unsynced: stored on a single device only

bulk_revoked.subject: All passkeys were removed from your {forum} account
bulk_revoked.actor_self: You initiated this revoke from the security tab.
bulk_revoked.actor_admin: A site moderator removed them on your behalf.

settings.title: Passkey
settings.description: Configure passkey authentication for this forum.
settings.rp_id_help: The DNS name that scopes a passkey. Leave blank to auto-detect from the request host. Changing this invalidates every existing passkey.
settings.rp_name_help: The name shown to users in the browser passkey prompt. Defaults to the forum title.
settings.related_origins_help: Additional origins permitted to perform passkey ceremonies. Used together with the W3C related-origins document at /.well-known/webauthn.
settings.user_verification_required: Required (always ask for biometric or PIN)
settings.user_verification_preferred: Preferred (ask if the device supports it)
settings.throttle_label: Login attempts per minute per IP

group_modal.require_passkey_help: Members will be reminded with a sticky banner until they register at least one passkey.
